title: Runbook: billing_daily Pipeline
content:
The billing_daily pipeline loads customer_dim, usage_fact, and billing_fact into the warehouse.
If customer_dim fails, billing_fact should not run because invoice enrichment depends on discount_code and account attributes.
Common failure modes include schema drift in promotions data, timeout during warehouse load, and delayed upstream snapshots.
Recovery steps: validate upstream contract, rerun customer_dim, and replay billing_fact after row-count checks pass.
